data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of having different providers for each step in the booking process. However, the evidence provided does not indicate any distinct providers being assigned to the individual steps of the service package. The linked use case specifies the need for different providers per step, but the evidence only shows a single booking without any mention of provider differentiation, which constitutes a clear gap in the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of different providers assigned to each step of the service.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
